evals.prompt: Create a pi extension that blocks dangerous bash commands and edits to .env files, can be hot-reloaded during development, and includes a quick way to test it.
evals.expected_output: Chooses an auto-discovered extension path, reads/follows pi extension docs/examples, uses ExtensionAPI with tool_call, handles ctx.hasUI/non-interactive mode, returns block reasons, and validates with pi -e or /reload.

evals.prompt: Build a pi custom tool extension that registers a notes_search tool with an action enum, truncates large output, and renders a compact result in the TUI.
evals.expected_output: Uses registerTool/defineTool, Type.Object plus StringEnum, execute(toolCallId, params, signal, onUpdate, ctx), truncation utilities, details for state/rendering, and renderCall/renderResult with pi-tui components.

evals.prompt: Add a /pick-model-preset command to pi with an interactive selector and persistent preset state across sessions/forks.
evals.expected_output: Uses registerCommand, ctx.ui.custom/select patterns, checks ctx.hasUI, stores/reconstructs state via session entries or tool-result details, and reads relevant TUI/session docs/examples before coding.
